policy: Portfolio translation converts configuration and historical memory into allocation posture, not automatic buy/sell instructions.

posture.label: Transition / verification
posture.durationPosture: Duration can be reviewed if confirmation improves
posture.creditPosture: Contained spreads allow holding quality exposure
posture.equityPosture: Favor quality growth and infrastructure enablers; avoid broad chasing without pullback confirmation
posture.commodityPosture: Maintain attention to power, copper, energy, and physical bottlenecks

allocationBias.rationale: Risk appetite is Strong but extended at 85; entries remain ruled.
Physical constraint axis is Tightening at 95.
Credit axis is Contained at 12; do not use index strength alone as permission.
Duration permission depends on real-yield relief without credit deterioration.

riskRules.watch: HY OAS / IG OAS widening while small caps break lower
riskRules.action: Downgrade risk posture and raise cash / defensive allocation.

riskRules.watch: MOVE, dollar, and volatility rise together
riskRules.action: Reduce speculative exposure and monitor global liquidity stress.

riskRules.watch: 10Y real yield falls materially without credit deterioration
riskRules.action: Reassess duration and growth multiple pressure.

riskRules.watch: Copper / power / energy inputs accelerate with inflation expectations
riskRules.action: Increase focus on infrastructure beneficiaries and inflation-sensitive risks.

historicalLessons.lesson: Do not assume multiple expansion while real yields remain restrictive; size risk around inflation and rate sensitivity.
Watch funding and volatility carefully; contained credit can delay but not eliminate repricing.
Physical constraints can convert inflation into margin pressure; infrastructure exposure matters.
Treat duration and weak balance sheets cautiously while real-rate pressure remains high.

missingEvidence: Portfolio-specific target allocation percentages are not yet connected.
Tax constraints and account-level liquidity needs are not integrated.
Ticker-level entry zones are handled outside this macro translation layer.
